title: Thai-Style Delicate Couscous Casserole
description: A flavorful and aromatic Thai-inspired couscous casserole made with delicate flavors.
instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the onion, mushrooms, and red bell pepper to the skillet and cook until the vegetables are tender, about 5-7 minutes.
Stir in the curry paste and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chickpeas, broth, soy sauce, and coconut milk to the skillet. Bring to a simmer.
Stir in the couscous and cook for 2-3 minutes or until the liquid has been absorbed.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Cover the dish with aluminum foil and bake for 25-30 minutes or until the casserole is hot and the couscous is tender.
Remove the foil and bake for an additional 5-10 minutes or until the top is lightly browned.
